# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source qualifies as an institute-worthy empirical research candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint describing a concrete evaluation of coding agents with repository context files across SWE-bench tasks and a newly constructed benchmark, and it reports specific measured outcomes including success-rate changes and cost increases. The source contains real experimental design, benchmark construction, and quantitative results rather than commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
